summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. PR #43659 is quarantined for central security handling because deterministic validation identified it as security-sensitive. Close, merge, fix, and low-signal closeout paths are not available for this job, and the remaining PRs require maintainer/technical judgment before any mutating action.

actions.reason: Focused behavior change with active author proof and product/compatibility implications needs maintainer technical judgment; no closure or fix action is allowed in this inventory shard.
The PR is useful but not safely closable or mergeable from this shard because proof is failing and prior bot review needs technical confirmation.
Likely useful focused fix with supplied proof, but overlapping PRs and technical correctness require maintainer selection; no canonical can be chosen automatically in this inventory shard.
Security-shaped token/auth-provider behavior must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling for this exact PR; no ProjectClownfish mutation is safe for #43659.
Looks promising and non-security, but this inventory shard cannot merge and the feature parity behavior still needs maintainer technical review.
